rationale: Both land on the correct disposition (duplicate of #4808) and diagnose the same root cause, but Y's narrative about #4809 tracking 5 call sites with #4810 fixing 4 and #4808 covering the 5th is a much closer match to what the ground-truth comment actually points to ('refer to #4809 comment for additional details'), whereas X only lists #4809 as a bare related link. X also asserts unverified facts confidently ('current main state... both fixes are present') without caveat, while Y explicitly flags that #4808's merge status is unconfirmed and that the regression test has a coverage gap for this exact file — a more diligent, maintainer-appropriate follow-up that addresses whether the reporter's problem is actually resolved end-to-end. Y is more complete and better grounded in what the thread resolution implies, at the cost of some unverifiable specificity shared by both.
